sourceMovie.title: Obi-Wan Kenobi: A Jedi's Return
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Obi-Wan Kenobi: A Jedi's Return works as a documentary movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Game of Thrones: The Last Watch
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Obi-Wan Kenobi: A Jedi's Return clicked for you, Game of Thrones: The Last Watch (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in documentary, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Obi-Wan Kenobi: A Jedi's Return?
faq.answer: Try Game of Thrones: The Last Watch, The Pixar Story, Making Squid Game: The Challenge—each shares DNA with Obi-Wan Kenobi: A Jedi's Return while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Obi-Wan Kenobi: A Jedi's Return?
faq.answer: Obi-Wan Kenobi: A Jedi's Return (2022) is best described as Documentary. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Obi-Wan Kenobi: A Jedi's Return worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this documentary lane.
